items.description: Led a team of 5 designers across operational and HR products. Set up collaboration processes with adjacent teams and helped embed design practices. Combined leadership with hands-on product work — ran part of the roadmap personally.

Owned a product with three interfaces for 8000+ warehouse staff and operations managers. Introduced UX testing before release to cut the cost of rework. Migrated interfaces to the core design system, speeding up development.

Ran a full-cycle redesign of a legacy CRM for a 1000+ operator call center — a smooth transition that saved the business on onboarding costs. Rebuilt key scenarios and migrated the interface to the design system. Grew a junior into a middle.
Worked across a group of logistics b2b products: improved scenarios for carriers and cargo owners. Managed a team of 7 designers, owned the design system, and ran the full hiring cycle.
